intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“医生拒绝 -> 床头电话 -> 医院总机 -> 正式询问某位病人 -> 手术成功 -> 什么时候能回家 -> 亲属吗 -> 我就是 John Gilbert”的电话反转链读顺。注意 whether / if / when 引导的间接问句，最后一句要轻轻停顿后再揭示身份。

sentences.text: While John Gilbert was in hospital, he asked his doctor to tell him whether his operation had been successful, but the doctor refused to do so.
sentences.focus_zh: 长句先在 in hospital 后小停；whether his operation had been successful 是间接问句，refused to do so 要读出医生拒绝告诉他。
focus_words: While John Gilbert was in hospital
whether his operation had been successful

sentences.text: The following day, the patient asked for a bedside telephone.
sentences.focus_zh: The following day 是第二天；bedside telephone 是床头电话，读成一个清楚的旧医院物件。

sentences.text: When he was alone, he telephoned the hospital exchange and asked for Doctor Millington.
sentences.focus_zh: alone 表示房里只有他一个人；hospital exchange 是医院总机，不是交换东西。

sentences.text: When the doctor answered the phone, Mr. Gilbert said he was inquiring about a certain patient, a Mr. John Gilbert.
sentences.focus_zh: inquiring about 是正式询问；a certain patient 要读得稍微神秘一点，因为他其实在说自己。

sentences.text: He asked if Mr. Gilbert's operation had been successful and the doctor told him that it had been.
sentences.focus_zh: if Mr. Gilbert's operation had been successful 是间接问句；that it had been 表示手术已经成功。

sentences.text: He then asked when Mr. Gilbert would be allowed to go home and the doctor told him that he would have to stay in hospital for another two weeks.
sentences.focus_zh: when Mr. Gilbert would be allowed to go home 是间接问句；another two weeks 是还要再两个星期。
focus_words: would be allowed to go home

sentences.text: Then Dr. Millington asked the caller if he was a relative of the patient.
sentences.focus_zh: caller 是打电话的人；relative 是亲属，这一句要读出医生在确认身份。

sentences.text: 'No,' the patient answered, 'I am Mr. John Gilbert.'
sentences.focus_zh: 最后一句是身份揭示；No 后停一下，I am Mr. John Gilbert 要读得清楚平静。
